summary: Virginia Green bridge smoke re-test FAILED at prerequisite check. outreach.signal_output still does not exist. All three dependent work packets verified (signal-queue constraint PASS, catchall frame PASS, bridge function PASS) but the bridge function itself returns BLOCKED because outreach.signal_output has never been created. This is the same structural gap identified in the original smoke test.

smoke_test_results.name: Prerequisite check: outreach.signal_output exists
smoke_test_results.issues: Table outreach.signal_output does not exist. Cannot insert D-04 signal. Same gap as wp-20260304-va-green-cid-sid-mid-smoke-test.

prerequisite_status.signal_queue_source_hub_constraint: PASS — PEOPLE, DOL, BLOG, MANUAL, OUTREACH, SYSTEM

root_cause: outreach.signal_output table has never been created. This is the origin table that feeds the bridge function. An outreach hub migration is required to create it before any smoke test through the signal_output→bridge→signal_queue path can proceed.
recommended_action: Route a create-table work packet to DB Agent for outreach.signal_output with columns: id (uuid PK), sovereign_company_id (uuid FK), signal_code (text), signal_category (text), lifecycle_phase (text), preferred_channel (text), preferred_lane (text), signal_data (jsonb), run_month (text), priority (integer), created_at (timestamptz). Then re-execute this smoke test.

deviations.detail: Same blocker as original smoke test — outreach.signal_output not created
